question_en: Find the distance between A(4,5) and B(4,8)
image_svg:
<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<line x1="30" y1="150" x2="270" y2="150" stroke="#333" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<line x1="150" y1="30" x2="150" y2="270" stroke="#333" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<text x="275" y="145" font-size="12" fill="#333">x</text>
<text x="155" y="25" font-size="12" fill="#333">y</text>
<line x1="230" y1="50" x2="230" y2="-10" stroke="#d32f2f" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5"/>
<circle cx="230" cy="50" r="6" fill="#1565c0"/>
<text x="240" y="40" font-size="13" fill="#1565c0">A(4,5)</text>
<circle cx="230" cy="-10" r="6" fill="#2e7d32"/>
<text x="240" y="-20" font-size="13" fill="#2e7d32">B(4,8)</text>
<text x="150" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565c0">жұӮ A е’Ң B зҡ„и·қйӣў</text>
</svg>
